decisions.decision: Sonnet implements, Opus reviews — token conservation
decisions.rationale: User flagged high token burn. Sonnet subagents execute tasks, Opus does inline spec+quality review between tasks.

decisions.rationale: Shared schema + DB schema are tightly coupled, no reason to separate
